title: cystopteris fragilis var. emarginatodenticulata
intro: Cystopteris fragilis var. emarginatodenticulata, also known as the emarginate-dentate or variable fern, is a type of plant belonging to the family Cystopteridaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to aid in the treatment of various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving overall well-being. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
